label: ECB MIR mortgage lending rate
governance_note: Monthly observed annualised agreed rate on new euro-area house-purchase loans.

label: ECB MIR NFC lending rate
governance_note: Monthly observed annualised agreed rate on new euro-area NFC loans.

label: Mortgage lending spread over DFR
governance_note: Computed as monthly MIR mortgage lending rate minus monthly average DFR.

label: NFC lending spread over DFR
governance_note: Computed as monthly MIR NFC lending rate minus monthly average DFR.

label: Household credit stock
governance_note: Monthly ECB MFI loans to households; broad fallback credit stock.

label: NFC credit stock
governance_note: Monthly ECB adjusted MFI loans to non-financial corporations.

label: House-purchase lending growth
governance_note: Monthly ECB annual growth in loans for house purchase.

label: Pure new house-purchase loans
governance_note: Monthly ECB MIR pure new loans for house purchase; shorter public sample.

label: BLS mortgage credit standards
governance_note: ECB BLS quarter-end observation only; no monthly interpolation or filling.

label: BLS enterprise credit standards
governance_note: ECB BLS quarter-end observation only; no monthly interpolation or filling.

label: BLS consumer-credit standards
governance_note: ECB BLS quarter-end observation only; no monthly interpolation or filling.

label: BLS mortgage loan demand
governance_note: ECB BLS quarter-end observation only; no monthly interpolation or filling.

label: BLS enterprise loan demand
governance_note: ECB BLS quarter-end observation only; no monthly interpolation or filling.

label: BLS consumer-credit demand
governance_note: ECB BLS quarter-end observation only; no monthly interpolation or filling.
